title: update_contact_fully single-transaction atomicity prevents observable intermediate state
description: Before this commit, a two-field contact patch made two separate store calls (set_contact_blocked, set_contact_display_name), each bumping ChatContact state independently. A concurrent ChatContact/get between the two bumps would see one field updated and the other not. update_contact_fully wraps all writes in a single SQLite transaction and emits exactly one state bump. The test test_contact_set_two_field_patch_bumps_state_once verifies this directly. A contributor might suggest splitting back into individual field calls for 'simplicity' — resist this; the intermediate-state visibility is the bug being fixed.
